footer.tagline: The open medical notes library for students, by students.
footer.contributeDesc: Share your notes and help fellow students succeed.

hero.headline: The medical notes library built for students, by students.
hero.subline: Find, share, and organize high-quality medical notes from Saudi universities.

howItWorks.heading: How MedNotes works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Find your medical school to access tailored curriculums and specific modules.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Navigate to the exact subject you're currently studying or revising for.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Access peer-reviewed notes instantly, or upload your own to help others.

universities.title: Saudi Medical Universities
universities.subtitle: Access study notes and materials from medical colleges across the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.

notFound.title: No universities found
notFound.desc: Try adjusting your search terms or checking back later.

modules.title: Study Modules
modules.subtitle: Browse specialized medical courses, modules, and subject areas.

notFound.title: No modules found
notFound.desc: Try a different search term or clear the university filter.

notes.title: Browse Notes
notes.subtitle: Find the exact study materials you need. Use the filters below to narrow down by university, module, and subject.

empty.title: No notes found
empty.desc: We couldn't find any notes matching your criteria. Be the first to upload one for this subject!

noteDetail.noDescription: No description provided for this note.
noteDetail.subject: Subject

upload.title: Upload a Note
upload.subtitle: Share your knowledge with the medical student community.
upload.guidelinesDesc: Ensure your notes are accurate, well-formatted, and do not contain patient-identifiable information (PII).
upload.subject: Subject
upload.descPlaceholder: Briefly describe what this note covers...
upload.fileUploadPlaceholder: Choose a file from your device
upload.fileUploadDesc: Accepted: PDF, Word, PowerPoint, images, audio, video
upload.successDesc: Thank you for contributing to MedNotes.
upload.errorDesc: There was a problem uploading your note. Please try again.
